title: Silky Adventurous Saudi Butternut Squash Stir-fry
description: An earthy and silky adventure in culinary delights featuring whole30-friendly butternut squash, this dish is a delightful fusion of bold flavors that tickles the taste buds.
instructions: Cut butternut squash into thin, wedged slices about half an inch thick. Season with salt and pepper on both sides.
Drizzle sliced butternut squash with olive oil and place in a baking dish. Roast for approximately 35 minutes until tender.
In a large skillet or wok over medium heat, add olive oil and saute garlic until fragrant. Add turmeric, cumin, and red chili flakes (if using) to the pan and stir for about 1 minute.

Add roasted butternut squash to the skillet with a bit of its cooking juice, reduce heat to low-medium and cook for an additional 5-7 minutes until squashes are lightly caramelized and the mixture is slightly thickened.
Sprinkle with black pepper. Serve hot as a side dish or on top of whole grain rice, quinoa, or cauliflower mash.
